name: Baked Tripe
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Tripe, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the tripe in oil and vinegar for 30 minutes.
2. Clean and prepare the onions and mushrooms. Sauté them in butter for two to three minutes. Remove from the frying pan and set aside.
3. In a fireproof casserole, combine half the tripe, onions, and mushrooms. Sprinkle with half the breadcrumbs.
4. Repeat layering the remaining ingredients: tomato puree (about 2 tablespoons), water, salt, pepper, and the rest of the breadcrumbs and tomatoes.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
